import io
import string

fn hashes(_ n: Int) -> String
  mut s = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    s = "#{s}#"
    i = i + 1
  end
  s
end

fn print_row(_ d: Int, _ c: Int) -> Unit
  println("#{d}: #{hashes(c)}")
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut c0 = 0
  mut c1 = 0
  mut c2 = 0
  mut c3 = 0
  mut c4 = 0
  mut c5 = 0
  mut c6 = 0
  mut c7 = 0
  mut c8 = 0
  mut c9 = 0

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      -1
    end
    match b
    when 48
      c0 = c0 + 1
    when 49
      c1 = c1 + 1
    when 50
      c2 = c2 + 1
    when 51
      c3 = c3 + 1
    when 52
      c4 = c4 + 1
    when 53
      c5 = c5 + 1
    when 54
      c6 = c6 + 1
    when 55
      c7 = c7 + 1
    when 56
      c8 = c8 + 1
    when 57
      c9 = c9 + 1
    when _
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  print_row(0, c0)
  print_row(1, c1)
  print_row(2, c2)
  print_row(3, c3)
  print_row(4, c4)
  print_row(5, c5)
  print_row(6, c6)
  print_row(7, c7)
  print_row(8, c8)
  print_row(9, c9)
end
